Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Planner.PlanClassHoursColumn

Represents the plan 'Class hours' column settings and value.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
ClassHours

The plan class hours.

 integer

None.
Name

The column custom name.

 string

None.
Order

The column order.

 integer

None.
